name: jj-ai-dispatcher
description: Local dispatcher for routing small controlled tasks to local AI workers and utility scripts. It reduces manual copy/paste between ChatGPT, Codex, Co-Claw/OpenClaw, and Git.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run smoke:local
scripts.test:unit: node scripts/validate-result-contract.mjs && node scripts/validate-mcp-contract.mjs && node scripts/validate-p4-data-contracts.mjs && node scripts/validate-p4-validation-models.mjs
scripts.build: node --check mcp/server/index.js && node --check mcp/server/http.js && node --check mcp/server/server.js && node --check mcp/server/bridgeClient.js && node --check mcp/server/errors.js && node --check mcp/config/loadConfig.js && node --check mcp/tools/index.js && node --check mcp/tools/schemas.js && node --check scripts/mcp-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/mcp-http-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/review-latest-run.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-result-contract.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-mcp-contract.mjs && node --check scripts/p4-data-contracts.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-p4-data-contracts.mjs && node --check scripts/p4-validation-models.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-p4-validation-models.mjs
